notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Willi Castro.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman plunked
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman hit by pitch. Kyle Karros to 3rd. Jake McCarthy to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Mickey Moniak pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Moniak pops out to shortstop Carlos Correa.

notableEvents.label: Mickey Moniak pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Moniak flies out to right fielder Cam Smith.

notableEvents.label: Troy Johnston pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Troy Johnston singles on a line drive to center fielder Taylor Trammell. Ezequiel Tovar scores. Edouard Julien to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Mickey Moniak pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Moniak pops out to third baseman Isaac Paredes in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Jose Altuve reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Willi Castro.

notableEvents.label: Taylor Trammell pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Trammell singles on a ground ball to left fielder Mickey Moniak. Christian Walker to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Cam Smith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cam Smith grounds into a double play, second baseman Willi Castro to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Carlos Correa to 3rd. Christian Walker out at 2nd. Cam Smith out at 1st.
